creator: amutu@amutu.com
text:
In this page: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/uses-zope.html ,the www/zope link pint to http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/url.cgi?ports/www/zope/pkg-descr,but there is no such port named www/zope. I see the Mk/Uses/zope.mk, it use www/zope213 now.

It is better to make www/zope a plain text instead of a link so it will no need to change the version when zope updated.
